g.text: Hash Join: Build and Probe Phase Mechanics (hash_join.c)
Build | O(M) | O(M) for hash table
Total | O(M + N) | M = small, N = large
Best | Build on smaller input | Minimizes memory pressure

div.p: Constraint: M * row_width < work_mem IO Cost: (M + N) sequential pages
Constraint: M * row_width > work_mem Behavior: Partition to disk -> recursive join
